arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' demand for attacking football has allowed one Celtic hero to shine
arts.sum: And as Brendan Rodgers looks to continue to demand flowing attacking football at Celtic, one player has shone after a tough start to his Hoops career. But now, with a full pre-season under his belt, the stats are showing that the German winger has become one of Celtic’s most potent attacking threats in the opening seven games of the season.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart shares the position he thinks Celtic need to address to thrive in Champions League
arts.sum: Speaking on the Scottish Football Social Club, Stewart pointed to the wide areas as a position he feels Celtic may need ‘an extra little bit of something’ in to give them more authority in the Champions League . Nicolas Kuhn can deliver for Celtic in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Baffled Michael Stewart calls out Rangers fans after Ianis Hagi red card lands madcap Celtic defence
arts.sum: The pundit was left in disbelief with what he heard from the stands at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Baffled Michael Stewart calls out Rangers fans after Ianis Hagi red card lands madcap Celtic defence
arts.sum: The pundit was left in disbelief with what he heard from the stands at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel accused of VANDALISM by ex ref as Celtic goalkeeper told what fans think of 'pathetic' antics
arts.sum: The goalkeeper was spotted scuffing up the penalty spot before Ronan Hale's opener for Ross County

arts.ttl: The seven big Celtic fixtures that will now tell us a lot about Brendan Rodgers' team
arts.sum: The first fixture after the international break has Brendan Rodgers facing Jimmy Thelin’s impressive Aberdeen at Celtic Park on the 19th of October. And Rodgers will need them because looking at the tough run of fixtures Celtic have from now until the next international break, the Hoops boss’ squad depth is set to be seriously tested both on the domestic and European fronts.

arts.ttl: Liam Shaw makes surprising Celtic admission after sealing Parkhead exit
arts.sum: And while the midfielder's time in Scotland didn't work out as planned, Shaw insists he leaves Celtic Park as a better player and memories that will last a lifetime. Liam Shaw played just two games in three years at Celtic .

arts.ttl: Celtic Euro rivals sack manager after miserable season start as club 'not meeting expectations'
arts.sum: Celtic’s Champions League opponents Young Boys have announced that Patrick Rahmen has left the club with immediate effect after a poor start to the campaign. Their communication read: “The sporting management of BSC Young Boys has decided to release head coach Patrick Rahmen with immediate effect.

arts.ttl: I played only 3 times for Celtic and made debut with Champions League icon – now I am selling houses
arts.sum: The Dutchman was a revelation at Parkhead but his pal didn't enjoy the same acclaim.

arts.ttl: Celtic FC Women vs FC Twente: Free live stream, TV channel, tickets and Champions League kick-off time
arts.sum: Celtic FC Women will make history tonight when they become the first Scottish team to play in the Champions League. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today.
